response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified song metadata from on-screen text for both songs: "モノポリー" by Narumiya and "葛飾ラプソディー" by Kohei Dojima. 2. Performer identified as Aki Rosenthal from hashtag #アキ口七生誕祭2026. 3. Used Google search for lyrics: ' "モノポリー" "なるみや" Japanese and English lyrics ' and ' "葛飾ラプソディー" "堂島孝平" Japanese and English lyrics '. 4. Retrieved lyrics and translated/verified for inclusion.
response.global_summary: A 2-song medley performed by VTuber Aki Rosenthal during her birthday event. The songs are "Monopoly" by Narumiya and "Katsushika Rhapsody" by Kohei Dojima.

scenes.description: Character starts singing "Monopoly" with the song title and artist information on-screen. The performance involves singing and dancing in a virtual concert setting.
Character starts singing "Katsushika Rhapsody" with the song title and artist information on-screen. The performance involves singing and dancing with audience avatars displayed around the stage.
scenes.song_title: 葛飾ラプソディー (Katsushika Rhapsody)
